untranslatable_reason: Signal requires option-level data (put/call ratio of open buy volume, earnings announcement dates) which are not available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. The strategy operates on options Greeks and corporate event data, not price/technical indicators. Additionally, cross-sectional ranking and portfolio construction mechanics (quintile assignment, long-short weighting) cannot be expressed as simple conditional rules on OHLCV or standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: This is a factor-based portfolio strategy requiring: (1) options volume data by contract type, (2) fundamental/event calendars (earnings dates), (3) cross-sectional ranking logic across a universe, and (4) portfolio construction mechanics. None of these can be mapped to the available price-action and technical indicators. Recommend implementing as a custom backtest module rather than a rule-based system.
